LEATT GROWTH OS

A Microsoft Fabric-powered ecommerce intelligence platform — from the real Leatt storefront through a Lakehouse/Data Factory engine, a live Power BI report, ML return-risk scoring, and SAP-ready financial reconciliation.

R9.8mnet revenue
48.1%gross margin
4,629orders
7.1%return leakage
2,000,000modeled transaction lines

The story

Leatt sells motocross and adventure safety gear — helmets, body protection, boots, gloves, goggles. The business question behind this platform: is growth profitable growth? R9.8m in modeled net revenue carries a 48.1% gross margin and 7.1% return leakage — Apparel is the largest category (R4.3m), and Organic Search the leading acquisition channel (R2.4m).

The Fabric engine — real, not simulated

This is a genuine Microsoft Fabric deployment, not a diagram of one. A capacity, workspace, Lakehouse, Data Factory pipeline item and Power BI report were created via the real Fabric REST APIs, with data physically uploaded into OneLake:

Workspace Apollis   e515bafe-7290-4832-ae1d-514be43a9d87
Lakehouse Leatt_BI_ML_Lakehouse   dca60749-eaef-410e-9121-ea16eedbc975
Data Factory pipeline pl_leatt_million_row_lakehouse_load   9e82c185-e0ac-485d-9810-4bccdcfe6cf9
Power BI report Leatt BI ML Executive Report   8c6988a7-fe5e-4fbe-abe9-ce7edd7fd63e
Capacity leattfabricf2 (SKU F2, South Africa North) — Paused when not in active use

OneLake files actually uploaded

LayerFileSizePurpose
Bronzeleatt_ecommerce_transactions_2m.parquet90.7 MB2,000,000-row transaction fact
Bronzeleatt_product_catalog.csv8.9 MB11,354 Shopify product variants
Bronzeleatt_synthetic_customers.csv13.5 MB180,000 synthetic customers
Silverleatt_customer_ml_scores.csv31.0 MBCustomer propensity/value ML scores

Semantic model tables

TableTypeGrainRowsDescription
fact_transaction_linesFactOne ecommerce order line2,000,000Core sales, discount, revenue, margin, return, payment and campaign fact.
dim_customerDimensionOne synthetic customer180,000Customer geography, rider type, acquisition channel, loyalty tier, age band and opt-in status.
dim_product_variantDimensionOne Shopify product variant11,354Extracted Leatt product/variant catalog with category, SKU, price, availability and source URL.
dim_dateDimensionOne calendar date912Calendar/date attributes derived from order_date for time intelligence.
customer_ml_scoresML OutputOne customer score180,000Repurchase propensity, value score, margin rate, return rate and ML segment.
agg_monthly/category/product/province/channelGold AggregatesReporting aggregateSmallPower BI-ready aggregate tables for executive dashboards.
finance_reconciliationFinance MartOne accounting period30VAT, refunds, sales excl/incl VAT, payment fees and expected cash reconciliation.
Honest caveat: the Power BI report was created and bound to the semantic model via the real Fabric API (operation succeeded, 100% complete), but an automated service export only produced loading/sign-in screens rather than rendered visuals — those blank exports are deliberately not presented as visual proof here. The report is real and reachable at its live URL; visual screenshots require a signed-in interactive session.

The money map

Growth quality, not just growth: category concentration, channel mix and the margin trend across 30 months of modeled trading.

Competitive positioning

CompetitorPositioningLeatt opportunity
Fox RacingMX and MTB gear leaderLeatt should lean harder into safety science, protection credibility, and South African origin story.
AlpinestarsPremium motorsport protectionCompete with test evidence, fit guides, and protection-first product storytelling.
100%Performance eyewear and gogglesFor Leatt eyewear, emphasize lens protection, riding conditions, and bundle with helmets.
OakleyPremium sport opticsLeatt must avoid pure optics battle; position eyewear as protection plus ride-specific value.
SCOTTBike and moto equipmentUse comparison content: Leatt vs Scott by lens, fit, helmet compatibility, price.

Finance & governance: SAP-ready reconciliation

Ecommerce revenue is reconciled to VAT, refunds and expected cash — the layer that lets Finance trust the BI numbers enough to post them.

Reconciliation (first 3 months)

MonthSales incl. VATOutput VATCash expected
2024-01R128.7mR16.8mR119.6m
2024-02R129.7mR16.9mR120.4m
2024-03R150.6mR19.6mR140.0m

Decision signals monitored

SignalReadingHealthDecision
Revenue momentumR3,994,247,413Healthy scaleTrigger exception commentary in the monthly trading pack.
Margin quality48.5%Strong but must be protectedProtect margin-positive product mix and bundle high-margin items.
Return leakage4.9%WatchlistImprove sizing, delivery promise, PDP content and post-purchase guidance.
Hero category concentrationApparel R1,759,430,045Strategic dependencyCreate availability alerts and category-specific SEO/story pages.
Channel efficiencyDirect 100.0x ROASScale carefullyMove spend toward efficient journeys; keep paid experiments controlled.
Data completeness2,000,000 rowsAudit-readyPublish source, target, row count and commit ID in every close pack.
Cloud costFabric F2 pausedControlledResume only for refresh/demo, then pause again.

Azure & Fabric — cost discipline

Fabric F2 capacity is paused by default and only resumed for active work, then suspended again immediately — verified via both the Azure CLI and the portal UI. Full, timestamped teardown evidence: docs/AZURE_COST_SHUTDOWN_PROOF.md.

az fabric capacity suspend --resource-group rg-leatt-fabric-bi-ml --capacity-name leattfabricf2

Tags on the resource itself confirm intent: cost-control: delete-or-pause-after-upload, project: leatt-bi-ml, purpose: portfolio-proof.

Leatt Growth OS — Fabric-powered ecommerce intelligence portfolio project
Data modelled on Leatt's public product catalog (leatt.com) · Not affiliated with Leatt Corporation
